settings.security.title: Security
settings.security.subtitle: Protect your account with stronger sign-in and recovery options
settings.security.password.title: Change Password
settings.security.password.intro: Update your password regularly to keep your account secure.
settings.security.password.hint.subtitle: A stronger password protects your account better.
settings.security.password.hint.symbols: Add a symbol or special character
settings.security.twoStep.title: 2-Step Verification
settings.security.twoStep.intro: Add an extra verification step when changing access settings.
settings.security.twoStep.confirmEmailDe: We will send a verification code to your account email.
The code will be sent to
and must be entered to continue.
settings.security.twoStep.disableDescrip: Are you sure you want to disable 2-step verification for your account?
settings.security.questions.title: Security Questions
settings.security.questions.intro: Add backup questions to help recover your account later.
settings.security.questions.options.spou: In what city did your parents meet?
settings.security.questions.options.chil: What is the first name of your childhood best friend?
settings.security.questions.options.thir: What street did you live on in third grade?
settings.security.questions.options.sibl: What is your oldest sibling's birthday month and year?
settings.security.questions.options.chil: What is your oldest child's middle name?
settings.security.questions.options.sibl: What is your oldest sibling's middle name?
settings.security.questions.options.sixt: What school did you attend for sixth grade?
settings.security.questions.options.chil: What was your childhood phone number?
settings.security.questions.options.gran: What is your maternal grandmother's maiden name?
settings.security.verifyIdentity.title: Verify Your Identity
settings.security.verifyIdentity.label: Enter your current password
settings.security.recovery.title: Account Recovery
settings.security.recovery.intro: Set recovery contacts so you can regain access if you lose your password.
settings.preferences.title: Preferences

settings.preferences.appearance.title: Appearance
settings.preferences.appearance.intro: Choose the language and theme that fit your workflow.

settings.preferences.language.descriptio: Select the interface language used across the app.
settings.preferences.theme.label: Theme
settings.preferences.theme.description: Pick how Forma should appear while you work.
settings.preferences.danger.title: Danger Zone
settings.preferences.danger.intro: These actions are permanent and should be used carefully.
settings.preferences.danger.cardDescript: Removing your account permanently deletes your access and related content.
settings.preferences.deleteModal.title: Delete Account
settings.preferences.deleteModal.descrip: This action cannot be undone. Your account and related content will be permanently deleted.
